reference: I was diagnosed with two stones in my left kidney, each around five to six millimeters, and a stone at the vesicular junction, which I believe has been removed in my urine the day before yesterday. I also have a simple cortical cyst in my right kidney. I have to go to a foreign country for a week. What should I do for the stones in my kidney, and why does it sometimes hurt a little bit even after the stone at the vesicular junction was removed?
text: I was diagnosed with two stones in my left kidney, each around 5 to 6 millimeters, and a stone at the vesicular junction, which I believe has been removed in my urine the day before yesterday. I also have a simple cortical cyst in my right kidney.
